concerns.detail: Added text contains vulgar personal insults and unsupported character judgments including 'b人' (bastard), '走狗' (lackey/running dog), and 'jb' (vulgar slang) directed at the advisor and associated individuals.
concerns.excerpt: 这个b人干的事情几乎全天下人都知道

concerns.detail: Standalone deletion of '很push' removes substantive observation about the advisor's management/pushing style without replacement or typo cleanup justification.
Deletion of company names (Google, Microsoft, TikTok) removes substantive information about student industry placement outcomes, potentially suppressing relevant career trajectory data.
